name: Polska Kielbasa Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, sauté onion and carrots in butter until onion is tender.
2. Add potatoes and broth. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat; simmer vegetables until tender, about 25 minutes.
4. Remove from heat. Puree at least half of the mixture in a blender (more blended makes creamier soup).
5. Return pureed mixture to saucepan.
6. Add milk and sausage. Cook over low heat until sausage is heated through.
